visual_analysis.description: A red Coca-Cola can located in the center of the shelf, in front of the water bottle.
A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, positioned behind the red soda can.
A green Sprite can located to the left of the red soda can.
The wooden surface on which all the items are placed.

action_plan.explanation: The red soda can is directly in front of and blocking the graspable area of the clear water bottle.
The clear water bottle is now accessible and is the requested item for the user's thirst.
